examples: By 9:30 we had cast off and were heading downriver.
Cologne is not so very far downriver from Mainz.
During the 1990s, this river discharged over 100 million pounds of toxics downriver each year.
On beaching our raft downriver the guides managed to throw our freeloading passenger into the river.
In Paris, Mr Meier's Canal Plus head offices are downriver from Mr Gehry's now-empty American Centre.
